summary: Juli AI chat at /ai-chat with mode-aware suggested prompts, mock bootstrap/replies via ai-chat service, subcomponents for list/input/prompts; XSS-safe content display.

interfaceChanges.description: Full chat UI composed from ai-chat subcomponents and services
web/src/lib/services/ai-chat.ts — UI-only mock bootstrap and sendMockMessage

mappings.criterion: Renders message list, input, and send button for Juli chat interface.
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_ai_chat_tab.test.tsx::renders message list, input, and send button

mappings.criterion: Suggested prompts differ between Seller and Affiliate mode.
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_ai_chat_tab.test.tsx::shows seller suggested prompts in seller mode

mappings.criterion: With NEXT_PUBLIC_UI_ONLY=1, chat renders and sends mock replies without API calls.
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_ai_chat_tab.test.tsx::uses mock service only in UI-only mode without calling API

recommendations: Verify /ai-chat from bottom nav with dev server NEXT_PUBLIC_UI_ONLY=1.
